reviews.comment:
Pésima atención, los playeros tardan adrede y por lo que veo en otros comentarios es algo recurrente.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service, the beach attendants deliberately take their time and from what I see in other comments it's a recurring problem.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPNE9PYXZRRRAB

reviews.comment:
10 de la noche, un solo playero, tres autos adelante, media hora, esto es real? Pues si, menos mal que ya no soy socia del ACA. No vengo más.

(Translated by Google)
10 p.m., one beachcomber, three cars ahead, half an hour. Is this real? Well, yes, thank goodness I'm no longer an ACA member. I won't be back.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPNE9QcTB3RRAB

reviews.comment:
De noche Tenes que estar 20 minutos para que te atiendan. Si tenes suerte hay 1 solo playero. Sino tenes suerte como a mi tenes que esperar a que aparezca alguien para cargarte. Desastre

(Translated by Google)
At night, you have to wait 20 minutes to get service. If you're lucky, there's only one attendant. If you're unlucky, like me, you have to wait for someone to show up and fill up your tank. A disaster.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPbmRiRU1BEAE

reviews.comment:
Hoy 16/05/22  a las 0840 aproximadamenre, dos playeros que atendian sobre la expendedora mas cercana a Cabildo sacaban foto de las tarjetas de debito. REAL.

(Translated by Google)
Today, May 16, 2022, at approximately 8:40 AM, two gas station attendants working at the station closest to Cabildo were taking pictures of debit cards. REAL.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPN2Zlb1pnEAE

reviews.comment:
La gente que atiende los días de semana x la mañana en el store...cafecito y eso..se pasan de copados. Da gusto gente.sigan asi
